metadata.description: Personal multi-surface Claude system — core freshness/push hooks, session-hygiene + surface-check, domain skills, agents, commands, and composable rules. Single source of truth across Code, Cowork, and claude.ai/iPhone.

plugins.name: claude-kit-core
plugins.description: Core layer: SessionStart freshness/git gate + Stop push-gate (hooks.json, global via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}); 22 skills, 4 commands, 2 agents; composable rules. SessionEnd backup is delivered project-scoped, not by this plugin (decision 0005).
